title: tilia henryana var. subglabra
intro: Tilia henryana var. subglabra, also known as the Chinese Linden, is a deciduous shrub or small tree species within the Tilia genus, characterized by its broad leaves and fragrant flowers. This plant has been used in traditional Chinese medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Tilia henryana var. subglabra include reducing stress and anxiety, improving sleep quality, and providing relief from respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma. Herbal preparations of this plant can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, which are often used to promote relaxation and soothe the nervous system.
